description: Represents the stealth controls, blocked domains, target preferences, and trust parameters of the discoverability graph.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier for this preference set.

columns.name: identity_id
columns.constraints: FOREIGN KEY(core_professionalidentity.id), UNIQUE, ON DELETE CASCADE
columns.description: Links visibility parameters to the user's Living Professional Identity.

columns.name: is_stealth_mode
columns.description: If enabled, candidates are strictly hidden from searches and match triggers.

columns.name: blocked_companies
columns.description: JSON array of company identifiers/domains blocked from viewing this profile (e.g. ['stripe.com']).

columns.name: target_salary_min
columns.description: Strict base salary floor filter to prevent under-compensation offers.

columns.name: target_role_types
columns.description: JSON array of accepted workplace formats (e.g. ['Remote', 'Hybrid']).

columns.name: target_stages
columns.description: JSON array of targeted corporate scales (e.g. ['Series B', 'Enterprise']).
